ToolTipText.CultureInvariantString: Shows you additional information about this sound instance in 3D space
Value in centimeters  (operators = "<" ">") where "<100" is any sound that is within 100cms of the player
Value in seconds since this sound started playing (operators = "<" ">") where "<5" is any sound that played in the last 5 seconds
Value in decibels  (operators = "<" ">") where ">-5" is any sound that is louder than -5dB
